sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n116319" key="w(residw/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὡρεσῐδώτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n116319.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who brings on the seasons,</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">who gives the ripe fruits in their season,</tr_> epith. of Apollo, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">like</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὡρηφόρος</ref></xr>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">525.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
